title: STL Comparison Configuration - STRICT Profile
description: Strict tolerances for catching subtle geometry differences after initial debugging. Use baseline config (compare_config.json) for early development/debugging.

max_surface_deviation.description: Strict: Maximum 0.02mm surface deviation (baseline: 0.05mm). Tune per feature after identifying discrepancies.
max_surface_deviation.note: Only computed if CloudCompare available. May need per-feature tuning for rounded vs cone geometries.

watertightness.description: Both meshes must be watertight for 3D printing

face_count.description: Face count is informational only (varies with mesh resolution)

vertex_count.description: Vertex count is informational only (varies with mesh resolution)

max_surface_deviation.description: Numeric deviation check (requires CloudCompare) - STRICT enforcement

icp.description: Strict: Run ICP if offset exceeds 0.1mm (baseline: 0.5mm)
icp.description_rms: Strict: Fail if ICP RMS exceeds 0.005mm (baseline: 0.01mm)

coordinate_system.description: Both generators use millimeters, origin varies (card: corner, cylinder: center)

cloudcompare.description_sampling: Strict: 20k points (baseline: 10k) for higher resolution deviation analysis
cloudcompare.description_runtime: Allow longer runtime for higher sampling density
cloudcompare.description_directions: Compute C2M in both directions (ref→test and test→ref) for symmetric Hausdorff

tool_versions.comment: See tests/tool_versions.yml for authoritative version specifications. Strict profile REQUIRES exact versions.

openscad.note: Strict profile requires exact OpenSCAD 2026.01.03 with Manifold backend

cloudcompare.note: Strongly recommended for strict profile to enable surface deviation checks

performance.comment: Set to true to run test cases in parallel (requires thread-safe OpenSCAD execution)

usage_notes: STRICT PROFILE: Use after initial debugging and fixture generation
Purpose: Catch subtle geometry differences between OpenSCAD and web generator
Baseline profile (compare_config.json) should be used for:
- When gross issues need fixing first
Strict profile should be used for:
